nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Laniarius
nodes.summary: Laniarius（Laniarius）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如Red-naped bushshrike、Black boubou、Lühder's bushshrike等22种鸟类。

nodes.name: Albertine sooty boubou
nodes.summary: Albertine sooty boubou（Laniarius holomelas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Albertine sooty boubou。

nodes.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
nodes.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Albertine sooty boubou
nodes.summary: The Albertine sooty boubou (Laniarius holomelas) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests. It was formerly considered as a subspecies of the mountain sooty boubou (Laniarius poensis). References
